mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_link_locale_stats (id, full_short_url, gid, `date`, cnt, create_time, update_time, del_flag, city, province, country ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{fullShortUrl}, #{gid}, #{date}, #{cnt}, NOW(), NOW(), 0, #{city}, #{province}, #{country} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cnt = cnt + #{cnt}, update_time = NOW()
